---
title: "ES 667: Deep Learning"
subtitle: "IIT Gandhinagar · Aug 2026 · Prof. Nipun Batra"
---

[Course website](https://nipunbatra.github.io/dl-2026/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm}
[GitHub repo](https://github.com/nipunbatra/dl-teaching){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-sm}

---

## Module 1: Foundations & Deep Networks (Lectures 1–3)

| Lec | Topic | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|-------|:------:|:--------:|
| 1 | Why Deep Learning + MLP Recap | [HTML](html/lec01-why-dl-lecture.html) · [PDF](pdf/lec01-why-dl-lecture.pdf) | |
| 2 | Universal Approximation & Going Deep | | |
| 3 | Training Deep Networks in Practice | | |

## Module 2: Optimization (Lectures 4–5)

| Lec | Topic | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|-------|:------:|:--------:|
| 4 | SGD Variants | | |
| 5 | Adam & Learning Rate Schedules | | |

## Module 3: Regularization (Lectures 6–7)

| Lec | Topic | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|-------|:------:|:--------:|
| 6 | Classical Regularization | | |
| 7 | Modern Regularization | | |

## Module 4: CNNs & Visual Recognition (Lectures 8–10)

| Lec | Topic | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|-------|:------:|:--------:|
| 8 | CNN Deep Dive + Classic Architectures | | |
| 9 | Modern Architectures & Transfer Learning | | |
| 10 | Object Detection, Localization & Segmentation | | |

## Module 5: Sequence Models (Lectures 11–12)

| Lec | Topic | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|-------|:------:|:--------:|
| 11 | RNNs, LSTMs, GRUs | | |
| 12 | Seq2Seq & Applications | | |

## Module 6: Attention & Transformers (Lectures 13–15)

| Lec | Topic | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|-------|:------:|:--------:|
| 13 | Attention Mechanism | | |
| 14 | The Transformer | | |
| 15 | Tokenization & Pretraining | | |

## Module 7: LLMs & Vision-Language Models (Lectures 16–18)

| Lec | Topic | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|-------|:------:|:--------:|
| 16 | Large Language Models | | |
| 17 | Alignment & Finetuning | | |
| 18 | Vision-Language Models | | |

## Module 8: Generative Models (Lectures 19–22)

| Lec | Topic | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|-------|:------:|:--------:|
| 19 | Autoencoders & VAEs | | |
| 20 | GANs | | |
| 21 | Diffusion Models: Theory | | |
| 22 | Diffusion Models: Practice | | |

## Module 9: Frontiers & Wrap-up (Lectures 23–24)

| Lec | Topic | Slides | Notebook |
|:---:|-------|:------:|:--------:|
| 23 | Self-Supervised & Contrastive Learning | | |
| 24 | Efficient DL & Open Problems | | |
